title: Close_and_Open mask-shape close/open animation decode (evaluator)
goal: PREREQ for panel z-coverage. Census (this task): the 'Transition Drop Zones' group (id 999094061) carries a cross-container Image Mask (imageMaskSourceId=989704929 'Mask shapes', Invert=1) whose Top(989706176)/Bottom(989707439) shapes should CLOSE monotonically over photo A and HOLD fully-covered, then OPEN to reveal B. GT per-frame means: f0-f11 warm A (130,83,54) darkens to teal (11,38,38); f11-f15 HELD dark teal; f16-f23 opens to cool B (92,106,137). The teal is the decorative 'Top shapes'(op0.79)/'BG shapes'(op0.91) panel groups rendered BEHIND, revealed through the mask holes. BLOCKER: the evaluator decodes the Top/Bottom shape Y-position WRONG - worldTransform ty goes 911->593->373(f4 near-closed)->430->909(f8 back OUT), and opacity->0 at f10, i.e. it bounces in-then-out and vanishes instead of closing-and-holding. resolveImageMaskAlpha returns NULL at f10+ (no eligible geometry) = no occlusion where GT is fully closed. FIRST STEP: decode the Top/Bottom shape's Position.Y curve + its Emitter(replicator 989706183)/Cell timing (in='0 7680000 1 0' out='5893888/7680000'); the panels are factory-13 shapes driven by a replicator Emitter - the close-hold-open envelope likely lives in a Sequence/retime the evaluator is mis-sampling. DoD: evaluated Top/Bottom ty closes monotonically by ~f11 and holds through ~f15 (coverage 255) then opens; THEN wire the cross-container drop-zone Image Mask (renderChildLayers: source is non-descendant shape-geometry group + all visible children are drop-zone images) and verify net-positive vs GUI GT.
